reference: I have severe back pain on my left side above my hip. It feels like it is spreading throughout my back. I have also noticed black stool, but I have recently started taking iron supplements. It hurts to look up and down, and lying on my back hurts. When I lie on the sore side and breathe, it hurts more. I have not done anything that could cause this, and I only noticed it yesterday morning. It was like I flipped a switch, and I haven’t been able to turn it off. It is very painful.

It hurts to look up and down. Lying on my back hurts. When I lie on the sore side and breathe, it hurts more. I have not done anything that could cause this, and I only noticed it yesterday morning. It was like I flipped a switch, and I haven't been able to turn it off. It is very painful.
